{{Quote|Some time ago, we established an archaeological station on the dead planet, Alashan. There were theories that a great civilization once flourished there. Some of our scientists believed that elements of its science, its technology might have survived through the millennia.|[[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]|<ref name="World of Fire!">{{StoryCite|story=World of Fire!|book=Star Wars Weekly 107}}</ref>}}
'''Alashan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] of the [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
Home to a [[Unidentified Alashan culture|culture]], the world saw great technological advances in the [[Pre-Republic era]]. Building a [[Unidentified Alashan city|underground city]], the planet's life forms thrived in the fully powered city protected by the [[Sentinel (creature)|Guardian]]. The civilization, while advanced, did not last forever. At an unidentified time, the Alashans locked the city from the outside and vanished from all record.<ref name="TEA" />

Forgotten for the next several millennia, the world was not reached by the civilized galaxy until the arrival of an archaeological team sent by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. When the ''[[Staraker]]'' crashed on the surface later that same year, a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] followed and landed on the planet. With the Imperials, led by Major [[Wil'm Grau]] and the captive Rebels, including [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], searching the planet, they uncovered the abandoned dig site and the lost city of Forever. After a skirmish in the abandoned city with the Guardian, the survivors of the team fled the planet, with the city sealing itself upon their departure.

Remaining out of all galactic politicking, the planet was located in space controlled by [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]] as of [[137 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />
